com.rscja.deviceapi

Class RFIDWithUHFBase

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rscja.deviceapi.Device
      • com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithUHFBase
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    RFIDWithUHFBLEOfLiunx, RFIDWithUHFNetworkA4, RFIDWithUHFNetworkA8, RFIDWithUHFNetworkUR4, RFIDWithUHFSerialPortA4, RFIDWithUHFSerialPortA8, RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4, RFIDWithUHFUsb, SPUR4Linux, SPUR4Windows, UsbLinux, UsbLinuxDeviceAPI, UsbWindows

    public abstract class RFIDWithUHFBase
extends Device

      Constructors

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String generateLockCode(java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.Integer> lockBank, int lockMode)
      获取锁定码(Get lock code)
      示例代码:比如锁定EPC区和USER区 (Sample code: such as locking EPC area and USER area) List lockBank=new ArrayList<>(); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_EPC); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_USER); int lockMode =IUHF.LockMode_LOCK; String hexLockCode=generateLockCode(lockBank,lockMode);
      boolean marginRead(java.lang.String accessPwd, FilterEntity filterEntity, int bank, int ptr, int cnt, java.lang.String marginReadData) 
      void setConnectionStateCallback(ConnectionStateCallback btStateCallback)
      设置连接状态回调
      Set connection state callback
      void setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback)
      设置盘点回调接口，接收循环盘点到的标签数据
      Set the inventory callback interface to receive the label data from the cyclic inventory
      备注：需要在开始循环盘点startInventoryTag() 之前调用此方法。
      Note: This method needs to be called before starting the loop inventory startInventoryTag() .
      boolean setProtectedModeAndShortRangeMode(java.lang.String accessPwd, FilterEntity filterEntity, boolean isEnalbeProtectedMode, boolean isEnableShortRangeMode) 
      boolean startInventoryTag(InventoryParameter inventoryParameter)

    • Constructor Detail

      • RFIDWithUHFBase

        public RFIDWithUHFBase()

    • Method Detail

      • generateLockCode

        public java.lang.String generateLockCode(java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.Integer> lockBank,
                                         int lockMode)
        获取锁定码(Get lock code)
        示例代码:比如锁定EPC区和USER区 (Sample code: such as locking EPC area and USER area) List lockBank=new ArrayList<>(); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_EPC); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_USER); int lockMode =IUHF.LockMode_LOCK; String hexLockCode=generateLockCode(lockBank,lockMode);
        Parameters:
        lockBank - 要锁定的区域 (lockBank areas that need to lock ):
        IUHF.LockBank_KILL
        IUHF.LockBank_ACCESS
        IUHF.LockBank_TID
        IUHF.LockBank_USER
        IUHF.LockBank_EPC
        lockMode - 锁定的模式(lockMode lock modes):
        IUHF.LockMode_LOCK
        IUHF.LockMode_OPEN
        IUHF.LockMode_PLOCK
        IUHF.LockMode_POPEN
        Returns:
        返回锁定码，null表示失败(return lock code, null means failure)

      • setConnectionStateCallback

        public void setConnectionStateCallback(ConnectionStateCallback btStateCallback)
        设置连接状态回调
        Set connection state callback
        Parameters:
        btStateCallback -

      • setInventoryCallback

        public void setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback)
        设置盘点回调接口，接收循环盘点到的标签数据
        Set the inventory callback interface to receive the label data from the cyclic inventory
        备注：需要在开始循环盘点startInventoryTag() 之前调用此方法。
        Note: This method needs to be called before starting the loop inventory startInventoryTag() .
        Parameters:
        inventoryCallback - 盘点回调接口(inventory callback interface)

      • marginRead

        public boolean marginRead(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                          FilterEntity filterEntity,
                          int bank,
                          int ptr,
                          int cnt,
                          java.lang.String marginReadData)

                                                 FilterEntity filterEntity,
                                                 boolean isEnalbeProtectedMode,
                                                 boolean isEnableShortRangeMode)

      • startInventoryTag

        public boolean startInventoryTag(InventoryParameter inventoryParameter)
